notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins reaches on a fielder's choice. Sal Frelick to 2nd. Sal Frelick advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Curtis Mead.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Nationals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: José Tena grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Daylen Lile out at 2nd. José Tena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Tena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Nationals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: José Tena grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Daylen Lile out at 2nd. José Tena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Drew Millas. Garrett Mitchell scores.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds out, shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Curtis Mead.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez flies out to center fielder Jacob Young.
